2026-04-16GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Ratifying the Framework Agreement for International Collaboration on Research and Development of Generation IV Nuclear Energy SystemsOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Framework Agreement for International Collaboration on Research and Development of Generation IV Nuclear Energy Systems, done at Paris on 29 January 2025.N/A
subject: Order Ratifying the Framework Agreement for International Collaboration on Research and Development of Generation IV Nuclear Energy Systems
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Framework Agreement for International Collaboration on Research and Development of Generation IV Nuclear Energy Systems, done at Paris on 29 January 2025.
